description_long: This coffee machine features a boxy, modern design with a metallic brown and black exterior. The front panel is equipped with a large central dial, several buttons, and a prominent portafilter handle, suggesting it is an espresso machine. A metallic drip tray with a perforated surface sits at the base, designed to catch spills and excess liquid. The top of the machine has two metal rails, likely for cup warming or storage. On the right side, a steam wand is visible for frothing milk, while the left and rear sides are smooth and unadorned. The overall build appears robust, with a combination of metal and plastic materials, and the machine is compact enough for countertop use.
description: A compact, metallic brown and black espresso machine with a central dial, portafilter, drip tray, and steam wand. The design is modern and robust, suitable for countertop placement.
description_view_0: Side view showing the portafilter handle extending outward and the metallic drip tray below.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a smooth, glossy black surface with metal rails on top and no visible controls.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the portafilter handle and drip tray visible, but no steam wand.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the control panel with a central dial, buttons, portafilter, drip tray, and steam wand on the right.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel features a large central dial, three smaller buttons to the left, and a large knob to the right, all arranged horizontally on the upper front face.
